name_en: Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag, smooth leather offers a clean and sharp look, like the efficiency and resilience of a career woman, premium hardware pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant, excellent leather feel is soft, this Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful, downplaying the complexity of styling, not competing, just interpreting itself with the best quality
name_cn:

Style No.: 806034 (Large)
Size: 30*20*8cm
